mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingestion_jobs (id, knowledge_base_id, document_id, job_type, status) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{knowledgeBaseId}, #{documentId}, 'DOCUMENT', 'PENDING') ON CONFLICT (document_id, job_type) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET status = 'PROCESSING', failure_reason = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND id = #{documentId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chunk_embeddings ( chunk_id, knowledge_base_id, document_id, embedding, metadata ) VALUES
( #{item.chunkId}, #{item.knowledgeBaseId}, #{item.documentId}, CAST(#{item.embedding} AS vector), CAST(#{item.metadata} AS jsonb) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET node_logs = node_logs || CAST(#{nodeLogJson} AS jsonb), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.select: WITH stale AS ( SELECT id FROM documents WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND updated_at < #{updatedBefore} ORDER BY updated_at LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE documents AS document SET status = 'FAILED', failure_reason = 'Recovered stale ingestion task', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM stale WHERE document.id = stale.id RETURNING document.*
